reviews.comment:
Fue una alegría encontrar una YPF, después de tantos km por RN20 sin encontrar ninguna estación de servicios, no es gran cosa pero el personal tuvo una atención excelente, podrían instalar una full con más cosas pero bueno, traten de mejorarla pero No Cambien el Personal tanto de la simil full cómo la atención en la playa de expendio de combustible

(Translated by Google)
It was a joy to find a YPF station after so many kilometers on RN20 without finding a single one. It's not much, but the staff provided excellent service. They could install a full-service station with more amenities, but oh well. They should try to improve it, but don't change the staff, neither at the full-service station nor the service at the pumps.

reviewReply.comment: Apreciamos mucho su comentario Graciela , estamos  en constante mejoras para brindarle la mejor atención .

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoekxEZVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta te salva  después de venir xon un camión  se una ruta desértica 147 . Para descansar y recuperar  es muy buena . Los precios  son un afano . Un sanguche de miga 700 $ bueno abusan porqué es lo único que hay antes de llegar a san juan por la 20 osea faltarían 100 y pico de km

(Translated by Google)
This is a lifesaver after a long drive on the deserted Route 147. It's great for resting and recovering. The prices are outrageous. A simple sandwich costs $700. They're taking advantage because it's the only thing available before reaching San Juan on Route 20, which is still over 100 kilometers away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMmZiNlR3EAE

reviews.comment:
En el service solo cobran en efectivo y no te hacen ticket a menos que se lo pidas, ni hablar de carga puntos.
Para cargar nafta no hacen factura A, dicen que "no pueden".

(Translated by Google)
At the service station, they only accept cash and won't give you a receipt unless you ask for one, and forget about adding points to your account. They also refuse to issue invoices for gas; they say they "can't."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCOFlmWlFnEAE
